auth.footerNote: Sign up to search, compare, and request materials for EdTech services
auth.viewerDesc: For individuals, parents, students, and others. Search, compare, and request materials for services.
auth.selectLoginType: Choose the account type to log in with
auth.providerLoginDesc: Log in with an account as an EdTech provider or education-related organization.

auth.providerLoginDisabledDesc: Please log in with a general user account for now.

auth.googleHintMiddle: . If you haven't set a password yet, use

about.metaDescription: EduMatch is a platform that connects classrooms with education services. We help solve the challenges schools face and support the creation of better learning environments.
about.heroBody1: Discover and connect with the future of education.
about.heroBody2: EduMatch is a platform that connects classrooms with education services.
about.ctaBody: Feel free to reach out with questions about our services, media inquiries, partnership proposals, and more.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with the EduMatch team here
contact.name: Name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Please describe your inquiry in detail
contact.requiredNote: * indicates a required field. Depending on your inquiry, it may take some time for us to respond.
contact.hoursNote: * We usually respond to inquiries within 2-3 business days.
contact.aiBody: You can also reach us via the AI navigator at the bottom right of the screen (automated AI responses).
contact.faqBody: Before contacting us, please check our frequently asked questions.

authPassword.resetSubtitle: We will send a reset link to your registered email address
authPassword.unknownEmailPrefix: If you don't know your email address, please
authPassword.errExpired: This link has expired. Please enter your email address again to receive a new reset link.
authPassword.errInvalidLink: Invalid link. Please try resetting your password again.
authPassword.errSendFailed: Failed to send the password reset email
authPassword.errSendRetry: Failed to send the password reset email. Please try again later.
authPassword.sentBody: If the email address you entered is registered, we have sent a password reset link. Please check your email.
authPassword.step2: 2. Click the "Reset password" link in the email
authPassword.notReceived: If you don't receive the email, check your spam folder. If it still doesn't arrive after a few minutes, please try again.
authPassword.errUpdateFailed: Failed to change your password. The link may have expired. Please try again.
authPassword.errUpdateRetry: Failed to change your password. Please try again later.
authPassword.changedBody: Your password has been changed successfully. Please log in with your new password.
authPassword.sessionNote: For security, all login sessions on other devices have been signed out.

authGate.title: Members-only content
authGate.subtitle: You need a free account to view this content. Registration takes about one minute.
authGate.benefit1Desc: Access all articles, including members-only content.
authGate.benefit2Desc: Save articles and services you're interested in and review them anytime.
authGate.benefit3Desc: Get email updates about new content in categories you care about.
authGate.benefit4Desc: AI recommends content tailored to you.
authGate.securityTitle: Your data is in safe hands
authGate.securityBody: Personal information is handled securely and is never shared with third parties.

authRegisterComplete.title: Registration complete
authRegisterComplete.emailSent: We sent a confirmation email to your registered address. Please click the link in the email to complete verification.
authRegisterComplete.noEmailBody: Check your spam folder. If it still doesn't arrive after a few minutes, please
authRegisterComplete.step1Desc: We sent a confirmation email. Click the link in the email to complete verification.
authRegisterComplete.step2Title: Set up your profile (name, contact info, etc.)
authRegisterComplete.step2Desc: Adding your name, phone number, and contact details makes material requests smoother. You can also set interest categories.
authRegisterComplete.step3Desc: Enjoy members-only articles, service information, and more.
authRegisterComplete.setupProfile: Set up profile (name, contact info, etc.)

contactComplete.title: Inquiry received
contactComplete.body: Our team will reply to your registered email address.
contactComplete.responseTimeBody: We usually respond within 2-3 business days. For urgent matters, please call us.
contactComplete.confirmEmailBody: We sent a confirmation email. If you don't receive it, check your spam folder.
contactComplete.idNote: is required for follow-up questions or status checks. Bookmark this page or save the ID.

faq.ctaBody: If your question isn't answered here, feel free to contact us.
